Video.summary: Emeril's in the kitchen to help you bring the best breakfast to the table. Plus, recipes: Kicked-Up Coffee, Fluffy Biscuits with Sausage Gravy, and more.
Video.title: Entertaining with Emeril

Video.summary: Emeril and food critic Ian McNulty make classic New Orleans cuisine.
Video.title: with Ian McNulty

Video.summary: Did you know that Louisiana is the country's biggest producer of blue crabs? Celebrate the blue crab with Emeril's crab and corn fritters, chilled avocado soup with crab relish, and crabmeat stuffed trout with vodka butter sauce.
Video.title: Louisiana Blue Crabs

Video.summary: New York City firefighters turn up the heat in Emeril's kitchen.
Video.title: Turn Up the Heat

Video.summary: Emeril whips up diner favorites.
Video.title: Diner Classics

Video.summary: Emeril prepares oysters and mussels, including oysters on the half shell with three sauces. Plus, Emeril's classic Moules mariniere with pommes frites
Video.title: Bivalves: Oysters and Mussels

Video.summary: Emeril shares the virtues of southern caviar, proving it can be both accessible and sustainable: Emeril's Grilled Shrimp with Caviar Butter.
Video.title: Sustainable Luxury: Southern Caviar

Video.summary: Subtley sweet, Emeril makes the most of figs: Goat Cheese Tart with Prosciutto and Port-Macerated Figs; Seared Duck Breasts with Spiced Fig Jam; Bucatini with Figs and Gorgonzola Sauce.
Video.title: Fig Envy

Video.summary: For your next get together, make okra the main event.
Video.title: Best Okra in Town

Video.summary: Emeril and his friend Bau Nguyen draw inspiration from Vietnamese dishes.
Video.title: with Bau Nguyen

Video.summary: Emeril and jazz legend Kermit Ruffins classic New Orleans cuisine.
Video.title: with Kermit Ruffins

Video.summary: Dine like a Hoosier with chicken fried steak, barbecue chicken, and sugar cream pie.
Video.title: Indianapolis Colts

Video.summary: Inspired by Louisiana's largest pecan farm, Emeril shares his favorite pecan recipes.
Video.title: Pecan Paradise

Video.summary: Smoked Trout Hash with Fried Eggs, Smoked Salmon Cakes on a Bed of Grilled Vegetables over Lemon Dill Sauce
Video.title: Cooking with Smoked Fish

Video.summary: For a Texan style tailgate, impress your guests with my take on the state's faves.
Video.title: Dallas Cowboys

Video.summary: Emeril and his friend Janie Glade create an economical meal that makes use of pantry staples.
Video.title: with Janie Glade

Video.summary: Emeril and dairy farm owner Sarah Roland create dishes using buffalo mozzarella.
Video.title: with Sarah Roland

Video.summary: For your next get together, try grilling squab instead of chicken.
Video.title: Bringing Back Squab

Video.summary: Scrambled Ham and Egg Breakfast Sandwiches on Biscuits; Kicked-Up Shrimp Caesar Salad Piadine; Turkey Sandwiches with Pesto Mayonnaise and Dried Cranberries
Video.title: Super-Duper Sandwiches

Video.summary: Crispy Seared Snapper with Parsnip Slaw and Herb Jus, Annie's Peasant-Style Escolar
Video.title: New New Orleans Fish

Video.summary: Cozy up with Emeril's warming and comforting classics, including hearty chicken pot pie topped with puff-pastry crust and Emeril's super-tasty spicy meatloaf
Video.title: Comforting Classics

Video.summary: For your next get together, bring a touch of New Orleans with some andouille sausage.
Video.title: Andouille Sausage 101

Video.summary: Lamb Chops with Minty Pepper Jelly Pan Sauce and Vegetables; Lamb Burger
Video.title: Lamb

Video.summary: They're staple recipes on many backroad kitchen tables: Stuffed Eggplant Pirogues; Brisket-Stuffed with Cornbread; Old-Time Corn Soup with Sausage
Video.title: Louisiana Backroads

Video.summary: Roasted Bell Pepper Soup with Shrimp Dumplings, Eggplant and Oyster Stuffed Peppers with Creole Sauce, Crunchy Asian Slaw, Tempura Roasted Peppers with Fresh Crab Salad
Video.title: Bell Peppers

Video.summary: Emeril's Frozen Milk Punch, Suzanne's Muffins, Kicked-Up Ambrosia Salad Parfaits, Apple Smoked Bacon, White Cheddar and Potato Omelet
Video.title: Summer Brunch

Video.summary: Fresh Crab and Horseradish Salad with Yukon Gold Potatoes and Baby Beets, Turnip Soup with Ham and Cornbread Croutons, Parsnip Cake with Cinnamon and Walnut Icing
Video.title: Vegetable Medley

Video.summary: Emeril kicks-up an old favorite, the casserole: Lamb and White Bean Casserole; Cowboy Chicken Casserole; Emeril's Favorite Choucroute Casserole; Risotto and Wild Mushroom Casserole
Video.title: Casseroles for Every Occasion

Video.summary: Crawfish Egg Rolls with Hot Sesame Drizzle, Crawfish Imperial, Crawfish Burgers, Fried Crawfish Tails with Olive Salad
Video.title: Crawfish Season

Video.summary: Breakfast, Emeril-style Orange Emeril; Chicken and Apple Sausage Hash with Fried Eggs Sunny-Side Up; Waffles with Fresh Strawberry Syrup
Video.title: Sunday Morning Breakfast

Video.summary: Portuguese Fried Chicken with Chili Mustard Sauce, BBQ Chicken and Andouille Hash with Poached Eggs
Video.title: Funky Chicken

Video.summary: Michael Jordan's One Day Pickle, Mary Beth's Pickled Beets and Eggs, Annie's Bread and Butter Pickles
Video.title: Pickled Items

Video.summary: Kicked-Up Asian Salad with Tuna and Funky Vinaigrette, Creole Mustard and Herb-Crusted Lamb with Mustard Sauce
Video.title: Cooking with Mustard

Video.summary: Pressed Ham Sandwich with Pimento Cheese Spread; Black-Eyed Pea Salad; Lemon Bars
Video.title: Picnic Planner Show

Video.summary: Pound Cake with Dried Fruit and Port Wine Reduction Sauce, Strawberries with Champagne Sabayon, Plums and Madeira over Ice Cream with Almond Cookies
Video.title: Desserts with Wine

Video.summary: Artichoke Seafood Salad, Baked Stuffed Artichoke
Video.title: Artichoke

Video.summary: For a Carolina inspired tailgate, wow your guests with Emeril's take on some hometown faves.
Video.title: Carolina Panthers
